description_long: This parking meter features a robust, rectangular main body with a slightly tapered top and a long, sturdy handle or mounting post extending downward. The front face displays a digital screen above a set of colored buttons and slots, likely for payment and ticket dispensing, with additional indicator lights and labels. The sides are equipped with vertical strips, possibly for tactile feedback or additional lighting, and the back is ribbed for structural reinforcement. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some plastic components, designed for durability in outdoor urban environments. The color scheme is predominantly black with some gray and colored accents on the interface. The design is modern and functional, suitable for installation on sidewalks or parking lots.
description: A modern, black parking meter with a digital display, colored buttons, and a sturdy handle or post, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, colored buttons, payment slots, and indicator lights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the vertical strip and the thickness of the main body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ribbed, reinforced back panel and the full length of the handle/post.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a vertical strip and the profile of the main body.
attribute_payment_interface: Front face features a payment interface with colored buttons, a card slot, and a digital display; likely accepts card and possibly contactless payments.
attribute_coin_slot: A slot is visible on the front below the display, rectangular in shape, possibly for coins or cards, but no explicit coin slot markings are visible.
attribute_digital_display: A rectangular digital display is present on the upper front, showing a green-tinted screen with interface elements.
attribute_mounting_post: A long, rectangular black post extends downward from the main body, likely metal, providing support and mounting capability.
